content: State management recommendation for offline-first IndexedDB app: Use Dexie's useLiveQuery (from dexie-react-hooks) as the primary reactive data layer — this replaces TanStack Query's server-state role. useLiveQuery observes IndexedDB queries and auto-rerenders components on data change, including cross-tab and service-worker mutations. Use Zustand v5.0.14 only for ephemeral UI state (modal open/closed, form dirty state, active tab, language preference). Do NOT use TanStack Query — it is designed for HTTP server state with cache invalidation strategies that don't map to local IndexedDB. Do NOT use React Context for async IndexedDB data — causes prop drilling and performance issues. The pattern is: Zustand (UI state) + Dexie useLiveQuery (data state). No global data store needed.
